title: Make active task continuity usable across registered projects
sources: human mandate, 2026-07-19: continue with multi-project task continuity

mainline.contradiction: Atthis can verify and enter one project while Mission Records can enumerate one project's active obligations, but no source-bounded path can answer which work is active across heterogeneous registered projects without either omitting projects or turning the workbench into a second task authority.
acceptance: A form decision identifies the smallest cross-project path and preserves each target project's ownership of task facts.
A multi-project query reports every registered project's support and availability state without silently treating partial results as complete.
An ordinary Agent can recover active work from at least two isolated project fixtures while an unsupported or invalid project remains explicit and no target task source is mutated.
